entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's knowledge and session management system, organizing sessions, pending updates, and tracking

entities.name: Strategic Partner Sessions
entities.context: Documentation system for strategic discussions stored at N5/sessions/strategic-partner/

entities.name: Pending Knowledge Updates
entities.context: Staging mechanism for proposed hypothesis updates, facts, and confidence adjustments before approval

entities.name: Human-in-the-loop
entities.context: Principle requiring human approval for ALL knowledge base changes - no automatic propagation

entities.name: review-pending-updates
entities.context: Command used to approve staged knowledge updates

entities.name: Topics to Revisit
entities.context: JSONL-based tracking system for unresolved questions, contradictions, and ideas needing more time

entities.name: Weekly Review
entities.context: Regular review cadence where flagged topics are revisited

relationships.context: N5 organizes and stores strategic partner session documentation
Sessions generate pending updates that are staged for review
All pending updates require human-in-the-loop approval before propagation
Command processes and approves staged knowledge updates
Tracked topics are flagged for weekly review
Sessions identify topics needing further exploration
